datasets.name: genie_monthly
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date) AS event_month,
  CASE workspace_id
    WHEN '1160807094185734' THEN 'DEV'
    WHEN '748821712601607' THEN 'QA'
    WHEN '759839464639728' THEN 'PROD'
    ELSE workspace_id
  END AS environment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT identity_metadata.run_by) AS active_users,
  COUNT(
    CASE
      WHEN action_name = 'createConversationMessage' THEN 1
    END
  ) AS questions,
  COUNT(
    CASE
      WHEN action_name = 'createConversation' THEN 1
    END
  ) AS conversations,
  COUNT(DISTINCT
    CASE
      WHEN action_name = 'createConversationMessage' THEN request_params['space_id']
    END
  ) AS active_spaces,
  COUNT(DISTINCT
    CASE
      WHEN action_name = 'createConversationMessage' THEN request_params['conversation_id']
    END
  ) AS unique_conversations
FROM
  system.access.audit
WHERE
  service_name = 'aibiGenie'
  AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
  AND action_name IN (
    'createConversationMessage', 'createConversation', 'executeMessageQuery', 'executeQuery'
  )
GROUP BY
  1,
  2
ORDER BY
  1,

columns.description: 1 if the month is fully complete, 0 for current partial month
columns.expression: CASE WHEN `event_month` < DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

datasets.name: genie_cumulative
queryLines:
WITH first_use AS (
  SELECT
    identity_metadata.run_by AS user_email,
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date)) AS first_month
  FROM
    system.access.audit
  WHERE
    service_name = 'aibiGenie'
    AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
    AND action_name IN ('createConversationMessage', 'createConversation', 'executeMessageQuery')
  GROUP BY
    1
)
SELECT
  first_month,
  COUNT(*) AS new_users,
  SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY first_month) AS cumulative_users
FROM
  first_use
GROUP BY
  1
ORDER BY

datasets.name: genie_weekly
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', event_date) AS event_week,
  CASE workspace_id
    WHEN '1160807094185734' THEN 'DEV'
    WHEN '748821712601607' THEN 'QA'
    WHEN '759839464639728' THEN 'PROD'
    ELSE workspace_id
  END AS environment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT identity_metadata.run_by) AS active_users,
  COUNT(
    CASE
      WHEN action_name = 'createConversationMessage' THEN 1
    END
  ) AS questions
FROM
  system.access.audit
WHERE
  service_name = 'aibiGenie'
  AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
  AND action_name IN (
    'createConversationMessage', 'createConversation', 'executeMessageQuery', 'executeQuery'
  )
GROUP BY
  1,
  2
ORDER BY
  1,

datasets.name: genie_spaces
queryLines:
SELECT
  COALESCE(n.display_name, a.space_id) AS space_name,
  a.space_id,
  COUNT(*) AS questions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_email) AS unique_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.conversation_id) AS conversations,
  MAX(a.event_date) AS last_active,
  MIN(a.event_date) AS first_active
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      request_params['space_id'] AS space_id,
      request_params['conversation_id'] AS conversation_id,
      identity_metadata.run_by AS user_email,
      event_date
    FROM
      system.access.audit
    WHERE
      service_name = 'aibiGenie'
      AND action_name = 'createConversationMessage'
      AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
      AND request_params['space_id'] IS NOT NULL
  ) a
    LEFT JOIN rai_qa_uc.ai_usage_monitor.genie_space_names n
      ON a.space_id = n.space_id
GROUP BY
  1,
  2
ORDER BY
  questions DESC

datasets.name: genie_retention
queryLines:
WITH monthly_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date) AS event_month,
    identity_metadata.run_by AS user_email
  FROM
    system.access.audit
  WHERE
    service_name = 'aibiGenie'
    AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
    AND action_name IN ('createConversationMessage', 'createConversation', 'executeMessageQuery')
    AND DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date) < DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE())
),
retention AS (
  SELECT
    a.event_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_email) AS active_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT b.user_email) AS retained_users
  FROM
    monthly_users a
      LEFT JOIN monthly_users b
        ON a.user_email = b.user_email
        AND b.event_month = a.event_month - INTERVAL 1 MONTH
  GROUP BY
    1
)
SELECT
  event_month,
  active_users,
  retained_users,
  active_users - retained_users AS new_users,
  CASE
    WHEN active_users > 0 THEN ROUND(retained_users * 100.0 / active_users, 1)
    ELSE 0
  END AS retention_rate
FROM
  retention
ORDER BY

columns.description: 1 if the month is fully complete, 0 for current partial month
columns.expression: CASE WHEN `event_month` < DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

datasets.name: genie_activity
queryLines:
SELECT
  DAYOFWEEK(event_date) AS dow_num,
  CASE DAYOFWEEK(event_date)
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Sun'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Mon'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Tue'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Wed'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Thu'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'Fri'
    WHEN 7 THEN 'Sat'
  END AS day_of_week,
  HOUR(CONVERT_TIMEZONE('UTC', 'America/New_York', event_time)) AS hour_of_day,
  COUNT(*) AS questions
FROM
  system.access.audit
WHERE
  service_name = 'aibiGenie'
  AND action_name = 'createConversationMessage'
  AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
GROUP BY
  1,
  2,
  3
ORDER BY
  1,

datasets.name: genie_space_monthly
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', a.event_date) AS event_month,
  COALESCE(n.display_name, a.space_id) AS space_name,
  COUNT(*) AS questions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_email) AS unique_users
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      request_params['space_id'] AS space_id,
      identity_metadata.run_by AS user_email,
      event_date
    FROM
      system.access.audit
    WHERE
      service_name = 'aibiGenie'
      AND action_name = 'createConversationMessage'
      AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
      AND request_params['space_id'] IS NOT NULL
  ) a
    LEFT JOIN rai_qa_uc.ai_usage_monitor.genie_space_names n
      ON a.space_id = n.space_id
GROUP BY
  1,
  2
ORDER BY
  1,

datasets.name: genie_adoption
queryLines:
WITH workspace_users AS (
  SELECT
    CASE workspace_id
      WHEN '1160807094185734' THEN 'DEV'
      WHEN '748821712601607' THEN 'QA'
      WHEN '759839464639728' THEN 'PROD'
      ELSE workspace_id
    END AS environment,
    COUNT(DISTINCT identity_metadata.run_by) AS total_users
  FROM
    system.access.audit
  WHERE
    event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 90 DAYS
    AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
    AND identity_metadata.run_by IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    1
),
genie_all_time AS (
  SELECT
    CASE workspace_id
      WHEN '1160807094185734' THEN 'DEV'
      WHEN '748821712601607' THEN 'QA'
      WHEN '759839464639728' THEN 'PROD'
      ELSE workspace_id
    END AS environment,
    COUNT(DISTINCT identity_metadata.run_by) AS genie_users_alltime
  FROM
    system.access.audit
  WHERE
    service_name = 'aibiGenie'
    AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
    AND action_name IN ('createConversationMessage', 'createConversation')
  GROUP BY
    1
),
genie_30d AS (
  SELECT
    CASE workspace_id
      WHEN '1160807094185734' THEN 'DEV'
      WHEN '748821712601607' THEN 'QA'
      WHEN '759839464639728' THEN 'PROD'
      ELSE workspace_id
    END AS environment,
    COUNT(DISTINCT identity_metadata.run_by) AS genie_users_30d
  FROM
    system.access.audit
  WHERE
    service_name = 'aibiGenie'
    AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
    AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
    AND action_name IN ('createConversationMessage', 'createConversation')
  GROUP BY
    1
)
SELECT
  w.environment,
  w.total_users,
  COALESCE(a.genie_users_alltime, 0) AS genie_users_alltime,
  COALESCE(d.genie_users_30d, 0) AS genie_users_30d,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.genie_users_alltime, 0) * 100.0 / w.total_users, 1) AS adoption_pct_alltime,
  ROUND(COALESCE(d.genie_users_30d, 0) * 100.0 / w.total_users, 1) AS adoption_pct_30d
FROM
  workspace_users w
    LEFT JOIN genie_all_time a
      ON w.environment = a.environment
    LEFT JOIN genie_30d d
      ON w.environment = d.environment
ORDER BY
  w.environment

datasets.name: genie_new_returning
queryLines:
WITH first_use AS (
  SELECT
    identity_metadata.run_by AS user_email,
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date)) AS first_month
  FROM
    system.access.audit
  WHERE
    service_name = 'aibiGenie'
    AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
    AND action_name IN ('createConversationMessage', 'createConversation', 'executeMessageQuery')
  GROUP BY
    1
),
monthly_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date) AS event_month,
    identity_metadata.run_by AS user_email
  FROM
    system.access.audit
  WHERE
    service_name = 'aibiGenie'
    AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
    AND action_name IN ('createConversationMessage', 'createConversation', 'executeMessageQuery')
)
SELECT
  m.event_month,
  COUNT(
    CASE
      WHEN m.event_month = f.first_month THEN 1
    END
  ) AS new_users,
  COUNT(
    CASE
      WHEN m.event_month > f.first_month THEN 1
    END
  ) AS returning_users,
  COUNT(*) AS total_users,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(
      CASE
        WHEN m.event_month > f.first_month THEN 1
      END
    )
      * 100.0
      / COUNT(*),
    1
  ) AS returning_pct
FROM
  monthly_users m
    JOIN first_use f
      ON m.user_email = f.user_email
GROUP BY
  1
ORDER BY

datasets.name: genie_monthly_complete
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date) AS event_month,
  CASE workspace_id
    WHEN '1160807094185734' THEN 'DEV'
    WHEN '748821712601607' THEN 'QA'
    WHEN '759839464639728' THEN 'PROD'
    ELSE workspace_id
  END AS environment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT identity_metadata.run_by) AS active_users,
  COUNT(
    CASE
      WHEN action_name = 'createConversationMessage' THEN 1
    END
  ) AS questions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT
    CASE
      WHEN action_name = 'createConversationMessage' THEN request_params['space_id']
    END
  ) AS active_spaces
FROM
  system.access.audit
WHERE
  service_name = 'aibiGenie'
  AND identity_metadata.run_by NOT LIKE '%@databricks.com'
  AND action_name IN (
    'createConversationMessage', 'createConversation', 'executeMessageQuery', 'executeQuery'
  )
  AND DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', event_date) < DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE())
GROUP BY
  1,
  2
ORDER BY
  1,

lines: Tracking AI/BI Genie Spaces usage across DEV, QA, and PROD environments.

frame.title: All-Time Adoption %
frame.description: % of workspace users who have ever used Genie Spaces

frame.title: 30-Day Active Adoption %
frame.description: % of workspace users active in Genie Spaces in last 30 days

lines: Usage breakdown by Genie Space — which spaces are driving the most engagement and how usage is distributed over time.
User acquisition, retention, and growth decomposition for Genie Spaces across the organization.
Deep dive into user engagement patterns — question volume trends, peak usage hours, and day-of-week activity distribution.
Data sources, metric definitions, environment mapping, and version history for this dashboard.

### Data Sources

| Source | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `system.access.audit` | Primary usage source. Filtered to `service_name = 'aibiGenie'`. Excludes Databricks employees (`@databricks.com`). |
| `rai_qa_uc.ai_usage_monitor.genie_space_names` | Lookup table mapping `space_id` → friendly display name. Populated by enrichment notebook. |

### Environments

| Workspace ID | Environment |
| --- | --- |
| 1160807094185734 | DEV |
| 748821712601607 | QA |
| 759839464639728 | PROD |

### Metric Definitions

| Metric | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| Active Users | Distinct users with any tracked Genie Space event in the period |
| Questions | Count of `createConversationMessage` events (user submitting a question) |
| Active Spaces | Distinct space IDs with at least one question in the period |
| Conversations | Distinct conversation IDs with questions |
| Retention Rate | % of current month's users who were also active in the prior month |
| New Users | Users whose first Genie Space activity is in the current period |
| Returning Users | Users who were active in a prior month and are active again |
| Adoption % (All-Time) | Genie Space users ever / total workspace users (90-day active) |
| Adoption % (30-Day) | Genie Space users in last 30 days / total workspace users (90-day active) |

### Technical Notes
* Counters exclude the current incomplete month
* Period comparison: month-over-month (%) with directional arrows (↑/↓)
* Environment colors: DEV = Blue (#2196F3), QA = Orange (#FF9800), PROD = Green (#4CAF50)

### Version History

| Version | Date | Author | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1.4.0 | 2026-05-12 | Brandon Croom | Removed conditional color formatting from all 6 period counters (Executive Summary + Adoption & Growth). Counter `target.style.rules` evaluated against the unsigned change magnitude — meaning decreases never triggered red. Arrows (↑/↓) correctly indicate direction without misleading color signals. |
| 1.3.0 | 2026-05-12 | Brandon Croom | Removed Cost page and Estimated Cost counter from Executive Summary. SUPERVISOR_AGENT billing is a shared inference proxy (not Genie-specific) — too imprecise to present as Genie Spaces cost. Added Global Filters page (Date Range + Environment). Cross-dashboard consistency standardization (Material 500 colors, >= operators, custom-order env sort). |
| 1.2.0 | 2026-05-12 | Brandon Croom | Added Estimated Cost counter to Executive Summary page (4 counters across top row). Fixed conditional formatting on all cost counters: increase = red (unfavorable), decrease = green (favorable). |
| 1.1.0 | 2026-05-12 | Brandon Croom | Added Cost page with 7 widgets and Genie Spaces Cost dataset. Includes monthly estimated cost, cost per question, DBU consumption, and month-over-month counters. Uses `system.billing.usage` with `SUPERVISOR_AGENT` as the closest available proxy for Genie AI inference cost. |
| 1.0.0 | 2026-05-12 | Brandon Croom | Initial release — 5 content pages, 9 datasets, 9 period counters. Includes: Executive Summary, Space Analysis, Adoption & Growth, Engagement Analysis, Glossary. Data from `system.access.audit` (aibiGenie service) + space name lookup. Features: environment-colored line charts, per-space usage breakdown, retention analysis, DOW/hour patterns, adoption rate comparisons. |
